quality_notes: Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
Something broke in production - our AI system was overcomplicating simple queries 🤔.

I was wrong to assume that adding more agents would fix the issue 🚫.

If the task is structured, then RAG is enough 💡.
But if open-ended reasoning is required, consider an agent 🤖.

If knowledge is enough, use RAG 📚.
But if actions matter, consider an agent 🚀.

So what did I learn? Use the simplest architecture that works 💻.

I finally understood that the hard part is not building agents, but deciding when you do not need them 🙅‍♂️.

💬 What is your approach: #ScaleEngineering #SoftwareArchitecture #SoftwareArchitecture #SoftwareArchitecture #SystemDesign
